title: A Rainbow Mountain of Peru

segments.text: These mountains look like a giant paint palette.
And it's completely natural, no filters needed.
Vivid reds, yellows, and greens amaze every visitor.
Hiking here feels like stepping into a dream.
This place will redefine your idea of beauty.
It’s nature showcasing its wildest colors.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: A mountain that looks painted by a giant. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌈
